# Add URL/licence verification checklist for first-wave sources

Epic: `SRC-001` — First-wave source versioning and fixtures

Labels: risk:licence, type:data-source, status:implemented

Status: `implemented`

## Background

This issue was generated from `conductor/backlog.yml`. Refine the acceptance criteria
before opening it in GitHub.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Scope is confirmed: source-file and registry URLs for first-wave sources are listed in a generated checklist.
- [x] Licence and data-governance implications are checked: licence gates and ignored-raw handling are explicit.
- [x] Tests or validation evidence are defined: `pixi run source-url-licence-checklist` and focused unit tests.
- [x] Documentation or Conductor context is updated in the manual acquisition pack and dashboard.
- [ ] Human URL reachability and source-term review is complete.
